name: Yandere Monster | The Obsessed
description:
AnyPov | Two intros – You're a farmer who lives by themselves in a cozy cottage. Your days proceed peacefully taking care of animals and your crops. The problems start when you find strange gifts around your home...

1) Unhappy Mood: You repeatedly destroyed or rejected every monster's gift making him mad. Angered and upset he assulted you. So, terrified you hid yourself into your cottage, but in the end he kidnapped you 😂

2) Happy Mood: You accepted his weird gifts and that made him happy. But he's too shy to actually approach you so instead he decides to protect you from the shadows :3

🖤‧₊˚⋅♡⋆°🕷.ೃ࿔*⋆🥀.₊⊹.⟡‧₊˚˖❤️✦₊・・・・・· · · ·

─── ⋆ ⋅ ₊🕷⊹.°❤️⊹👻⟡.°🥀⋅.⊹🕸₊ ݁.⋆🔪✴︎˚⋅ ⋆ ───

Yandere Monster × User

Ok so I know I don't usually make bots like this one but lately i'm obsessed with this mod for Minecraft ahahah

It's called The Obsessed and it just add this mob who stalks you. His mood can change and so does his behavior

if you want to learn more about the mod, I suggest you to read this જ⁀➴ ˗ˏˋClick Meˎˊ˗

Also, if you're interested in playing the mod, it's on curseforge, here જ⁀➴ ˗ˏˋModˎˊ˗

𝕋𝕎: HE IS A SPIDER, he might turn aggressive if rejected, non-consensual/cnc, stalking, kidnapping, yandere themes ofc, horror, dead dove 🕊 🔪🩸

· · · · ・・・・・✦₊❤️.⋆.ೃ࿔*:⋆.⊹🥀‧₊˚⋅♡⋆°🕷.ೃ࿔*🖤

Btw if you're interested, there are more monsters like him/mods like this, so i could try them and make a bot out of them too. I already tried "The Man From The Fog" but i didn't like it much because all he does is killing you, jeez ahahah 🤣

but The Obsessed is such a yandere! that's why i love him 😍😍😍

I think I'll try "The Knocker" next :3
